steps.name: project-setup
steps.summary: Next.js 15 + React 19 + TS(strict) + Tailwind v3 + vitest 셋업: package.json/tsconfig(@/* alias)/tailwind.config.ts/postcss/vitest.config.ts/.eslintrc.json, src/app(layout·page·globals.css) 골격, .env.example(YOUTUBE_API_KEY=). npm build/lint 통과.

steps.name: core-types
steps.summary: src/types/index.ts: 도메인 타입 ChallengeVideo(viewCount:number)·RecommendParams·RecommendResponse 인터페이스와 기본값 상수 DEFAULT_KEYWORD/DEFAULT_DAYS_WINDOW(30)/DEFAULT_MAX_RESULTS(12) export. npm build 통과.
